title: vangueria loranthifolia
intro: Vangueria loranthifolia, also known as the "Red Milkberry" or "Sour Plum", is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthraquinone glycosides content. The health benefits of Vangueria loranthifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and infusions for various medicinal purposes.
